description: Prisma SQLite foundation: add Patient model + region to Site, db client singleton (src/lib/db.ts), prisma generate + db push, empty seed (0 rows), smoke script proving counts=0

parse.ts reads ANTHROPIC_API_KEY from process.env (verified line 143), 0 hardcoded keys in source (grep sk-ant); .env.local created with placeholders (compromised key NOT written), gitignored (git check-ignore confirms .env*.local); .env.example documents it
